70010000105075.description:
About Homura: The Crimson Warriors
Fourteen years have passed since the Battle of Sekigahara split Japan in two.

Now firmly in control, the Tokugawa shogunate is scheming to eliminate the Toyotomi clan, a long-standing thorn in its side.

In response, the Toyotomi clan has decided to confront the Tokugawa head-on, using Osaka Castle as their stronghold. Calls for support were sent to daimyo throughout the nation and a mere few answered the call. One of these brave warriors was Nobushige Sanada, the second son of the Sanada family who was cast away to Mt. Kudo on house arrest after the Battle of Sekigahara.

Alongside Nobushige on his escape from Mt. Kudo are the Sanada Ten Braves, ten ninjas who serve him even after their exile. Standing in their way are the Ura Yagyu, a group comprised of assassins who have carried out many killings under orders from the shogunate, mysterious swordsmen, and mighty warriors.

This is the final chapter of the Warring States period. It is a tale of the bonds and way of life shared by the Nobushige Sanada and the Ten Braves who gather at Osaka Castle.

Key Features
Amongst the fire and ashes, love will prevail — Previously released in Japan on PS Vita in 2018, Western fans can experience the historical fantasy otome as the protagonist Mutsumi Mochizuki fights alongside the Crimson Warriors. Accompanied with multiple endings and CGs, this legendary battle of love tangled with iconic historical events and original characters in the Warring States period is sure to capture the hearts of history otome lovers!

Maintain peak performance with Energy Reading — Use Energy Reading to detect the affection level and Ring status of love interests. Mutsumi has the special ability to adjust the love interests' Rings. When sped up, it allows them to utilize unique powers at the cost of their physical health. Make sure to keep their Rings balanced! If their health deteriorates too much, the consequences could be dire…

Ninja Guidance — Use your ninja scrolls to keep track of where you are in the story and revisit moments of the past if you seek a different outcome of the path you've chosen. Adjust both your affection and ring levels with each warrior when you select previously viewed events to change the course of history!

Path of the Samurai — Throughout the story, you can level up your ninja rank to keep up with the Crimson Warriors during battle. Take your ninja skills to the next level and make it your mission to reach Master rank and ensure victory against the Ura Yagyu!
70010000105075.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their final showdown!
70010000105075.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors

70010000105076.description: The Digital Short Stories include five stories—one for each love interest. In 20 pages, find out what happens outside of the battlefield and how fiery things can get!
70010000105076.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their
70010000105076.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Digital Short Stories

70010000105077.description:

70010000105077.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their final showdown!
70010000105077.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Digital Soundtrack

70050000065184.description:
Prince Azure, Monsieur Brunette, Mrs White, Madame Rose, Miss Peach and Inspector Gray join the modern Clue digital game!

Redesigned and updated for the modern era, this pack contains twelve new suspect tokens that can be used on any crime scene you own.

Whether you’ve been waiting eagerly for their return or you’re meeting them for the first time,  when you add the Legacy Suspect Pack to your game, you can play the most iconic, nostalgic version of Clue!  

INCLUDES:
- 2 x PRINCE AZURE TOKENS – Give the prince a royal welcome to the modern Clue digital game!
- 2 x MONSIEUR BRUNETTE TOKENS – The roguish con artist swindles his way back onto the board.
- 2 x MRS WHITE TOKENS – The original Mrs White makes her grand return to the game.
- 2 x MADAME ROSE TOKENS – Madame Rose always knew she’d come back to Clue someday…
- 2 x MISS PEACH TOKENS – The Southern belle graces the board with her presence once more! 
- 2 x INSPECTOR GRAY TOKENS – This corrupt cop finds the Clue board again!
70050000065184.intro: More fan-favourite legacy suspects return to Clue!
70050000065184.name: Clue: Legacy Suspect Pack

70070000033943.description:
Brave the Ura Yagyu and win the hearts of the Crimson Warriors with the Deluxe Edition! This bundle includes the digital game, five short stories featuring fiery romance for each of the five love interests, and a 26-track digital soundtrack!

The Deluxe Edition includes:
・Digital Standard Edition
・Digital Short Stories (20 Pages)
・Digital Soundtrack (26 Tracks)
70070000033943.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their final showdown!
70070000033943.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Deluxe Edition

70010000103641.description:
Solve the wacky point & click puzzles filled with horror and humor. Break the witch's curse on your home as you explore five distinct regions, each hiding a sacred key to unlock the village chest.

Features:
- Despite the bright graphics, this game is definitely not for children!
- Memorable characters with their own personality
- Ultra-high resolution artworks
- Unconventional humor
- Some evil creatures
70010000103641.intro: Solve the wacky point & click puzzles filled with horror and humor!
70010000103641.name: NubiaPhobia

70010000120286.description:
Travel through Time! In this cozy hidden-object adventure, cats and friends explore the contrast between a magical past and a high-tech future. Every detail invites you to discover that whether in a castle or a skyscraper, friendship and fun are timeless.

Start your journey in The Old Kingdom, a peaceful medieval citadel where everyday life unfolds with gentle humor. Watch clumsy trainees, wandering performers, and eccentric adventurers in a world inspired by classic RPGs, full of warm encounters and legendary charm.

Then, warp into The New Frontier to visit Neo-Cat Metropolis. Explore a bustling city of glass towers and floating platforms where robots get confused and flying cars break down. Amidst the neon lights, discover that friends helping friends is what truly keeps the future moving.

Features:

- Cats and Friends: Find delightful characters in two detailed scenes—one from a mythic past and one from a comic future.
- Balloon-Popping Fun: Enjoy relaxing gameplay as you pop balloons across the scenes—a bit of fun with every search!
- Rich Details: Explore beautifully illustrated settings that blend fantasy and sci-fi with visual storytelling in every corner.
- Over 600 Items to Find! Search for 202 cats, 202 unique characters, and colorful balloons hidden throughout the ages.
- Atmospheric Soundtrack: Set the tone with immersive music tailored to match each era—from cozy medieval tunes to chill futuristic beats.
- Family-Friendly Fun: With cozy, pressure-free gameplay and intuitive controls, it’s an experience for all ages. Perfect for relaxing together or playing solo.

Celebrate the connection between myth and machine in this heartwarming journey—where every moment is worth remembering.
70010000120286.intro: Join cute cats in a time-travel adventure! Find feline friends and pop balloons as you explore a magical medieval kingdom and a chaotic sci-fi metropolis.
70010000120286.name: Meow Moments: Celebrating Myth & Machine

70010000093949.description:
You are hired as a mini-golf level tester by the french company ROGOLF. Management will always expect big quality scores from your golfing skills... 
Thanks to the help of the Smuggler, cheat your way through the floors of this strange office building, or get fired trying to !
Bonuses you buy will grant you access to secret rooms, rule-breaking cards and make your score explode !
In need of a day off ? Try the "Team Building" multiplayer game mode, and play locally with up to 4 players.
70010000093949.intro: Play mini-golf, buy equipment and score enough points to reach the top. Each level has it’s own rules and each game is different.
70010000093949.name: ROGOLF

70010000109763.description:
Begin a heartfelt journey through enchanted forests where magic lingers in every branch and shadow. As a small owl guided by gentle spirits, you soar above glowing marshes, whispering trees, and ancient groves. Your purpose is to restore balance by flying through magical circles that awaken plants, revive wildlife, and breathe life back into forgotten woodlands.
Along your journey, you will find memory shards hidden beneath canopies, inside hollow trees, or deep within misty swamps. These fragments reveal the long-lost past and help you uncover your true mission. Collect enough of them, and new regions of the forest open before you—each with its own atmosphere, story, and mysteries.
At the start of each level, you are introduced to the history and significance of the land you are about to explore. Spirits may call to you as you glide, offering guidance, sharing memories, or asking for your help. Your adventure is one of gentle exploration and quiet discovery, woven together by the wisdom of the forest and the echoes of an ancient story.
70010000109763.intro: Take flight as a small owl, exploring mystical woods and restoring life through ancient magic.
70010000109763.name: Owlen and Whispering Woods

70010000110165.description:
European TRUCK Simulator
Start your journey as a professional truck driver and explore the vast road networks of Europe! In European TRUCK Simulator, you will transport cargo between cities, complete delivery contracts, and experience the life of a long-distance trucker in a detailed 3D world.

Take control of powerful trucks, plan your routes, and drive across highways, countryside roads, and busy urban areas. Complete transport missions, deliver cargo safely, and earn rewards to improve your trucking career. Manage your deliveries carefully, maintain efficiency, and build your reputation as a reliable driver.

As you progress, unlock new trucks, upgrade your vehicles, and expand your fleet to take on bigger and more profitable jobs. Improve your trucks’ performance and customize them to match your driving style.

Whether you enjoy simulation games or relaxing driving experiences, European TRUCK Simulator offers immersive gameplay where you can travel across Europe and build your own trucking success story.

Features:

• Drive powerful trucks across European roads
• Deliver cargo and complete transport missions
• Earn rewards and upgrade your trucks
• Unlock new vehicles and expand your fleet
• Change between day and night driving
• Experience different weather conditions, including rain
• Enjoy a relaxing and immersive driving experience

Are you ready to start your trucking career and conquer the roads of Europe?
70010000110165.intro:
Drive powerful trucks across Europe.
Deliver cargo and complete transport jobs.
Upgrade your trucks and expand your fleet.
70010000110165.name: European TRUCK Simulator

70010000111131.description:
Morkull Ascend to the Gods is a 2D action video game focused on boss battles, once again taking control of the charismatic God of Death: Morkull.

Set in the original world of Morkull Ragast's Rage, locked up and aware that he is in a new video game, you must help him escape so that he can carry out his evil plans for the world and rule by subjecting everyone to his will (yes, including you).

You will feel the power and bear the weight of being the God of Death and Darkness. A select series of battles against other henchmen, minions, and Gods that make up the Olympus of the Kingdom of Midaldus await you.

But don't worry, don't tremble. You won't be alone. You'll have Morkull (or rather, he'll have you), who has a wide range of combos, skills, and charms that you can unlock, equip, and build to your liking before each battle.

Although you'll also die a good handful of times.

Morkull is back!

This means that his charisma, character, and personality, along with his breaking of the fourth wall, will create a lighthearted atmosphere at all times (you're going to need it), loaded with bad jokes, references, and memes that are very present in pop culture.

It's like having a friend playing alongside you.

Like its predecessor, Morkull Ascend to the Gods is completely hand-drawn and animated, with great care and frame by frame. In this way, thanks to traditional animation, the characters' movements are very natural and full of life.

Distinguished by a stylized character and a wide color palette, this time, outside of Ragast, you will be able to see and discover other environments that belong to the Kingdom of Midaldus.

Morkull is back! So get back in trouble with him and join his ranks by supporting his Machiavellian cause.
70010000111131.intro: Get in trouble with Morkull again!
70010000111131.name: Morkull Ascend to the Gods

70010000115122.description:
■ MotionRec is a "recording puzzle action" game.

Use the ability to record your own movements and play them back elsewhere to explore a world of devastation.

You can record the trajectory of your movements, from walking to jumping. Use stage gimmicks to create and record more complex movements to traverse the world.

■ Record your movements and play them back in another location!

This will let you reach places too high to jump up to, or even access spots where there's nothing to stand on.

Make good use of the MotionRec ability to unravel the mysteries behind this devastated world ruled by machines!
70010000115122.intro: Use stage gimmicks to create and record more complex movements to traverse the world.
70010000115122.name: MotionRec

70010000116049.description:
Duck Battle Royale is a chaotic battle royale where the fiercest competitors are ducks. Enter a world full of quirky quacks, encounters, and unpredictable chaos.
Every match is a test of timing, strategy, and sheer luck as you face off against feathered foes. Expect the unexpected, embrace the silliness, and dive into a wildly entertaining showdown. 
Will you outsmart your opponents and rise to the top?
The battlefield waits — and only one will claim victory.
70010000116049.name: Duck Battle Royale

70010000117910.description: Move the Nintendo Switch™ to guide balls through handcrafted mazes.
70010000117910.intro: Move the Nintendo Switch™ to guide balls through handcrafted mazes.
70010000117910.name: Game With Balls

70010000118428.description:
By day, they are untouchable icons.
By night… they are men with secrets.

The city sees fearless superheroes: symbols of strength, protectors of justice, living legends.
But when the masks come off, you discover the truth hidden beneath power and perfection.

Desire.
Tension.
Control.
Vulnerability.

Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroes Behind the Mask is a narrative-driven gay dating visual novel where your choices shape your relationship with powerful anime superheroes living double lives.

Each hero hides more than his identity.
Behind the public image lies pressure, expectation… and a connection he can’t risk.

You’re not just another civilian.

You’re the one man who sees him, not the symbol, but the person.

Will you break through his walls?
Will you protect his secret?
Or will passion blur the line between hero and something far more dangerous?


FEATURES:

● POWERFUL HERO CAST: Meet anime superheroes with unique abilities, strong personalities, and hidden weaknesses.

● SECRET IDENTITIES: Discover who they really are when the mask comes off.

● CHOICE-DRIVEN ROMANCE: Your decisions influence trust, intimacy, and destiny.

● MULTIPLE STORY ROUTES: Each hero has branching paths and exclusive scenes.

● DIFFERENT ENDINGS: Romance, betrayal, obsession, redemption… or heartbreak.

● HIGH REPLAY VALUE: Unlock new dialogue, hidden moments, and alternate outcomes.


He fights villains in the shadows.
Will you be the one he lets in… after dark?
70010000118428.intro:
When the city sleeps, their control begins to slip.
Behind every mask… there’s a man who could ruin you.
Will you earn his trust or surrender to the danger?
70010000118428.name: Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroes Behind the Mask

70010000118453.description:
By day, they are symbols.

By night… they are something else.

The city worships them as fearless heroines: guardians of justice, icons of power, untouchable legends.
But when the lights fade and the masks come off, you discover a side no one else is allowed to see.

Strength. Doubt. Desire. Vulnerability.

Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroines Behind the Mask is a narrative-driven dating visual novel where your choices shape your relationship with powerful anime superheroines hiding more than just their identities.

Each heroine carries a double life.
A public symbol of perfection… and a private world filled with secrets, pressure, and temptation.

You’re not just another civilian.

You’re the one person who sees the woman behind the legend.

Will you earn her trust?
Will you protect her secret?
Or will passion blur the line between hero and something far more dangerous?


Features:

● POWERFUL HEROINE CAST: Meet anime superheroines with unique powers, personalities, and hidden weaknesses.

● SECRET IDENTITIES: Discover who they really are when the mask comes off.

● CHOICE-DRIVEN ROMANCE: Your decisions influence trust, intimacy, and destiny.

● MULTIPLE STORY ROUTES: Each heroine has branching paths and exclusive scenes.

● DIFFERENT ENDINGS: Romance, betrayal, obsession, redemption… or heartbreak.

● HIGH REPLAY VALUE: Unlock new dialogue, hidden moments, and alternate outcomes.


She fights villains in the shadows.

Will you be the one she lets in… after dark?
70010000118453.intro:
When the city sleeps, their secrets awaken.
Behind every mask… there’s a woman who could break you.
Will you uncover the truth or fall for the danger?
70010000118453.name: Dangerous Superheroes After Dark: Heroines Behind the Mask

70010000118879.description:
After breaking up with Erika, Bianca's life unravels once more when a second magic camera appears and a new girl, Lúcia, enters the scene. Will she reconnect with Erika or explore a new path with the mysterious student council president?

Magic Exposure 2 is a cute yuri-themed visual novel adventure with a supernatural twist! Take the role of Bianca in a story spanning 15,000 words and featuring 2 romance options to date. Make critical choices for Bianca to affect the narrative and explore multiple endings, unlocking special CG scenes along the way!

• Follow the tale of unlikely companions in a world of anthropomorphic characters!
• Enjoy cute and romantic dialogue spanning a story of 15,000 words.
• Use convenient features to auto-advance, save, load or skip!
• Make key choices for the protagonist and unlock special CG scenes.
• Explore themes of girls’ love with 2 different characters to date!
70010000118879.intro: Find new love or mend a broken relationship as you make key choices in a yuri-themed visual novel adventure!
70010000118879.name: Magic Exposure 2

70010000119211.description:
Get ready for the most important mission in the zoo: making sure the laziest and most adorable panda in the world reaches its favorite bamboo!

In Panda Keeper, you take on the role of the keeper and must use logic, patience, and a bit of strategy to push the big fluffy buddy around the enclosure without getting him stuck in tight corners. Each level is a new habitat filled with rocks, fences, and corridors that turn a simple “little push” into a delightful brain teaser.

With 30 short and clever stages, the game is perfect for relaxing while keeping your mind active. There’s no ticking clock, no pressure — just you, the panda, and that magical moment when everything lines up perfectly… and he finally sits down happily to munch on bamboo.

Made a wrong move? No problem! Use Undo to test new ideas or Restart to begin fresh. Here, experimenting is part of the fun.

Cute, clear, and satisfying, Panda Keeper is perfect for anyone who loves calm puzzles, strategic challenges, and the simple joy of seeing a well-fed panda at the end of each level.
70010000119211.name: Panda Keeper

70010000119787.description: Your army awaits orders! Put the right units on the right line at the right time and win every battle you enter. No excuses for the enemy!
70010000119787.intro: General, prepare your army for victorious battles. Select the card and make your first move!
70010000119787.name: Hearthstorm

70010000119969.description:
Start learning Japanese with Hiragana—the essential first step.
In this simple fill-in-the-blank quiz game, a missing character is hidden with a circle. Choose the correct Hiragana to complete each word!

Short questions make it perfect for quick study sessions, and repeated play helps you recognize shapes and readings naturally. Great for beginners, refreshers, and families learning together.

Fun Hiragana practice with fill-in-the-blank quizzes

Easy controls, quick rounds

Build reading basics through repetition
70010000119969.intro: Learn Hiragana fast—fill-in-the-blank quizzes for Japanese beginners.
70010000119969.name: Japanese Basics HIRAGANA Fill-in Quiz

70010000120292.description:
Survive the Night. Escape the Dead.

Darkness descends and the undead rise. Armed with only a handful of weapons and the shelter of an abandoned house, you must fight to see the sunrise. Can you hold out, or be overwhelmed?

Features

Retro arcade thrills with modern polish

Gorgeous 16-bit pixel art bursting with personality

Spooky, toe-tapping chiptune soundtrack

Play solo or team up in local co-op

Arcade and Survival modes for endless action

Compete on leaderboards for 1 or 2 players

20 pulse pounding stages of undead mayhem

6 unique weapons and items to aid your survival

Collect hidden letters to unlock a devastating super weapon

Black & White and CRT filters for an authentic horror atmosphere
70010000120292.intro: Living Dead House delivers a pulse pounding, classic arcade experience. Battle through waves of the undead solo or team up with a friend.
70010000120292.name: Living Dead House

70010000120482.description:
Blast into VECTORED, a high-energy arcade shooter inspired by classic shoot ’em ups and rebuilt for modern play.

Take control of a fast, agile drone and dive into a dark, corrupted woodland where shadowy forms and glowing red signals collide. Within a single woodland-style arena, enemy AI units emerge endlessly, pressing in from all directions as the forest reacts to your presence.

There are no stages to clear and no breaks in the action. As your score climbs, the world pushes back harder, with faster enemies, tighter patterns, and increasing pressure that demands constant movement and sharp reflexes.

Like the arcade legends before it, VECTORED is easy to learn and instantly satisfying. But surviving the escalating chaos requires mastery, awareness, and total control of the airspace.

Built for quick pick-up-and-play sessions and endless score-chasing, VECTORED delivers that classic “one more run” feeling, set against a striking dark woodland world lit by red energy and motion.

Old-school roots. Modern reflexes.
70010000120482.intro: Pilot your drone through a dark, corrupted forest in VECTORED. Endless AI swarms adapt as your score rises. Easy to learn, brutal to master. Can you survive the swarm?
70010000120482.name: VECTORED

70010000120789.description:
Sprunki Hell Towers is a dynamic platformer with horror elements, where every jump matters.
You play as one of the Sprunki and climb sinister towers to save friends captured by the villain Black. Each tower is a separate trial with its own atmosphere, mechanics, and mood: from bright and almost cheerful levels to anxious, oppressive sections with horror elements.

The game is built on fair but demanding gameplay. Mistakes are punished, but always fairly — no randomness or injustice. Difficulty grows gradually, forcing you to learn, adapt, and feel real progress.

You'll experience:
• unique towers of varying height and difficulty
• diverse game mechanics that change from level to level
• stylish music and recognizable Sprunki characters
• vibrant environments that gradually become darker
• tense but captivating atmosphere

Sprunki Hell Towers is a game about overcoming, rhythm, and concentration. Climb higher, don't look back, and don't let Black keep your friends trapped.
70010000120789.intro: Vibrant platformer: conquer horror towers and save Sprunki from Black
70010000120789.name: Sprunki Hell Towers

70010000120795.description:
Take the wheel and launch into the sky in STUNT RACE — an adrenaline-fueled driving experience where gravity is just a suggestion.

DEFY THE LAWS OF PHYSICS
Race through impossible tracks suspended high above a sprawling city. Loop through aerial rings, dodge obstacles in the clouds, and prove your skills on death-defying courses designed to push your reflexes to the limit.

THREE WAYS TO PLAY
• STUNT RACE — Navigate twisted loops, floating platforms, and mid-air hazards in heart-pounding timed runs
• STRAIGHT ROAD — Hit top speed on an endless highway and launch off a massive ramp into the unknown
• PLAYGROUND — Your personal stunt arena with ramps, jumps, and room to experiment with insane tricks

POINTS FOR STYLE
Every second in the air counts. Flip, spin, and rotate your car to rack up points. The bigger the rotation, the bigger the reward. Land it clean or crash spectacularly — either way, it's a show.

FEEL THE IMPACT
Real damage physics mean every collision leaves its mark. Watch your car crumble, dent, and shatter as you push it beyond limits. Four unique vehicles, each ready to be destroyed in spectacular fashion.

CINEMATIC PRESENTATION
Stunning visuals with realistic lighting bring the city skyline to life beneath your wheels. An energetic soundtrack keeps your pulse racing from start to finish.

Strap in. Floor it. Fly.
70010000120795.intro: Fly through loops, smash cars & pull insane stunts above a stunning city skyline.
70010000120795.name: Stunt Race

70010000097719.description:
Fit and Fry: Mise en Place is a casual puzzle game set in a restaurant, where every challenge takes place inside a frying pan. The goal is to perfectly organize the ingredients on the board, fulfilling customer orders and progressing through 40 levels that mix strategy and fun.

The mechanics are easy to learn yet addictive to master: move, rotate, and position the ingredients until everything fits in the right place. As you advance, the grids become larger and more complex, demanding more and more planning.

Customer orders work as extra challenges, rewarding players with stars if they aim to complete everything. While optional, they add replayability and bring more flavor to the experience.

The game starts with introductory levels to learn the rules, moves on to intermediate stages with conveyor belts and a greater variety of ingredients, challenges players in advanced stages with nearly maximum-sized boards, and culminates in the final levels that test everything learned so far.

With a smooth difficulty curve, engaging atmosphere, and always creative challenges, Fit and Fry: Mise en Place is the perfect dish for puzzle fans and casual players.
70010000097719.name: Fit and Fry: Mise En Place

70010000110699.description:
PULMO is the ideological continuation of ALVEOLE and the second part in a trilogy about the human journey. Our project explores human behavior in a society where everyone will find their own meanings. Your goal is to change the environment around you to influence people's behavior by solving spatial puzzles. The crowd in the game acts according to its own rules, sometimes helping, sometimes interfering, but always reacting to your actions.

Take control of the fate of a lone wanderer, challenging the silent crowds in a series of mysterious trials. There is no rush here, no victory or defeat - just a quiet dialog between you and the game. Follow this short but meaningful journey, absorbing every moment like the last ray of sunset.

Features:
- Unique art style combining 3D graphics and minimalistic hand-drawn style.
- High-quality music and audio accompaniment for full immersion in what is happening.
- Unsimilar puzzles with different complexity.
- Cutscenes and levels with deep narrative.
- Each cutscene has been worked out to the last detail.

«No matter how large the crowd around you may be, you will be left alone in the last moment. No matter how rich you may be, you will be a beggar in the end. No matter how dazzling your luck may seem, its wings will turn to dust. No matter how much joy you sow on your way, the harvest will be bitter.»
70010000110699.intro: PULMO is a casual puzzle game where you control a lone character in a world full of faceless crowds.
70010000110699.name: PULMO

70010000113177.description:
Fast Food Van Simulator is a food truck experience where precision, speed, and strategy turn a small burger van into a thriving business. Step inside your fully interactive truck, prepare orders under pressure, satisfy demanding customers, and grow your culinary reputation one perfect burger at a time.

Each session challenges you to receive orders, cook accurately, serve quickly, earn points, and collect tips. The better your performance, the more you can invest in upgrades and expansion.

Prepare a wide range of burgers — from Classic and Cheesy Deluxe to Spicy, Double, Veggie, and Breakfast specialties. Add fries, salads, drinks, and milkshakes to complete combo meals. Special requests like “no onion” or extra toppings keep you on your toes.

Manage your stock carefully, restock ingredients in real time, and upgrade your equipment to handle multiple orders faster and more efficiently. Every second counts when patience bars start dropping.

Upgrade your grill, expand storage, unlock faster movement, automate ingredient drawers, and optimize your workflow layout to maximize profits.
Dynamic customers, VIP guests, expressive reactions, and increasing difficulty make every shift unique.

Key Features
- Real-time burger preparation and order management
- Wide variety of burger recipes and combo meals
- Customer patience system and dynamic reactions
- Points and tip-based reward system
- Equipment, speed, and storage upgrades
- Stylized 3D cartoon visuals with energetic soundtrack

Step inside your van, heat up the grill, and prove you have what it takes to turn pressure into profit. In Fast Food Van Simulator, every second matters and every perfect burger brings you closer to success.
70010000113177.intro: Heat the grill. Rule the street.
70010000113177.name: Fast Food Van Simulator

70010000113768.description:
Spy Guy is an amazing detective who searches for hidden objects in various locations and cities around the world. This time, he has been tasked with traveling to Europe to find hidden objects in European capitals and cities. 
Spy Guy Europe, with a new hint system and three game modes, is a great choice for anyone who loves searching for hidden objects and solving puzzles.
70010000113768.intro: Spy Guy sets out to conquer Europe in a brand new detective game!
70010000113768.name: Spy Guy Europe

70010000117528.description:
Manafinder is a RPG with rich exploration, nostalgic turn-based combat, and original pixel art.

In a vast and untapped world, powerful wild beasts roam the dangerous lands. A community of survivors known as the exiles depends on heroes like Lambda to obtain the power of manastones to keep their civilization safe.

Fight your way against ferocious beasts and other enemies in the quest for manastones as you define the fate of the exiled! 


Features
* Nostalgic fantasy role-playing game
* Explore the fantastical world of Aevi
* Meet diverse and interesting characters
* Collect items, weapons, and elemental ores
* Your choices matter
70010000117528.intro: Become a Manafinder and survive in an untamed magical world
70010000117528.name: Manafinder

70010000118184.description:
In Hotel Renovator Simulator, you take on the role of a master renovator and manager. 
Your task is to restore an old, neglected hotel, transforming it from a pile of rubble into a five-star establishment. 
Progress from your very first room to managing a massive hotel complex with 24 unique rooms across multiple floors.

Key Features:

- Complete Restoration: Every project begins with clearing the space. Use the trash bin to get rid of clutter and make room for your future masterpiece.

- Total Transformation: You control every aspect of the finish. Use the hammer to replace old flooring with new tiles, put up fresh wallpaper, repaint walls with a roller, and upgrade ceiling panels.

- Design and Furnishing: After the renovation comes the beautification stage. Choose furniture   from an extensive catalog — from classic Majesty beds to modern Chelsea sofas and Orbit tables. Arrange items in designated zones to create a cozy atmosphere for your future guests.

- A Living Hotel: Your job isn’t limited to just repairs. Greet guests at the reception, hand out keys, and manage their check-ins. Happy guests are the key to your success and your main source of income.

- Economy and Development: Complete restoration tasks to earn money for new materials and furniture. Invest your profits to unlock new floors and expand your business.

- Professional Growth: Master your craft! Upgrade your tools (roller, hammer, spatula) to work faster and more efficiently.
70010000118184.intro: Your hotel. Your design. Your rules.
70010000118184.name: Hotel Renovator Simulator

70010000118215.description:
Welcome to a horror experience set during a long, lonely night inside an empty office building.
What begins as a normal overtime shift quickly turns unsettling. The building grows quiet and the silence becomes almost unbearable. Something about the place feels wrong — as if the office has changed.
As the night continues, reality starts to feel unstable. While moving through the office, the harder it becomes to trust what you see.
You came here to finish your work and go home.
But now it feels like you might not be the only one left in the building.
The office looks the same, yet something here definitely isn’t.
70010000118215.name: Not Human Nightmare

70010000120346.description:
Step into the scorching sands of the Persian Gulf, 1991. Coalition forces are pushing deep into Iraqi-held territory, and every dune, every bombed-out building, every oil-choked horizon is a potential kill zone. Desert Storm War drops you into the heart of Operation Desert Storm as a special operations soldier fighting alongside a squad of AI teammates across brutal, tactically demanding frontlines.

Lead Your Squad. Hold the Line.
You never fight alone. Your team of combat-hardened bot soldiers reacts to the battlefield in real time — laying down suppressive fire, flanking enemy positions, and calling out threats. But the enemy is just as organized. Opposing bot teams move with coordination and aggression, adapting to your tactics across every engagement. No two firefights play out the same way.

A War That Feels Real
Desert Storm War is built around one goal: authenticity. Powered by a full IK (Inverse Kinematics) character system, every soldier on the battlefield moves like a human being, not a puppet.

Full Foot IK — Boots plant naturally on uneven terrain, rocky embankments, and rubble-strewn streets. No more floating soldiers or clipping feet.
Arm IK — Weapons are gripped and braced dynamically. Lean against cover, climb obstacles, or crouch behind a wall and watch your soldier's arms adjust in real time.
Head-Look — Characters track threats, teammates, and movement with natural head turns and gaze direction, making every NPC feel aware, alive, and dangerous.

The result is a squad of soldiers that look and move like they actually belong in a warzone.

Fight through a series of distinct operational levels drawn from the Gulf War conflict — desert highway ambushes, urban clearing operations in occupied Kuwait, fortified bunker assaults, and open-terrain armored pushes under the blazing Middle Eastern sun. Each level presents a different tactical challenge, forcing you to adapt your approach, manage your squad, and outgun a well-organized enemy force.
70010000120346.intro: The desert doesn't forgive. Neither do you.
70010000120346.name: Desert Storm War FPS

70010000121166.description:
It's World War Worm! Victoria is under siege at the battle front. After a two-year absence, Mighty Aphid returns to battle Lady Bug and her evil horde once again. This time, the villainess has created her own Mighty warriors to take on the pint-sized hero.

Run, shoot, swim, dash, and fly. Rescue the innocent. Fight mighty bosses. Earn powerful upgrades.
70010000121166.intro: Run, shoot, swim, dash, and fly.
70010000121166.name: Mighty Aphid 2

70050000066419.description:
Celebrate springtime with this special Easter outfit! 
Dress your character in a colorful holiday look that’s perfect for egg hunts and festive farm adventures. 
This DLC contains the following clothing set: Colorful Outfit.
70050000066419.name: Sugardew Island - Easter Costume

70070000032319.description:
Take care of your animals and your farm, sell your goods to the cute Forest Folk, upgrade your farm, and fulfill small orders from the Harmony Tree to fill the tiny island with life again. 

If you wish, you can go on dates with friendly locals, each with their own unique personality and backstory!
70070000032319.intro: Run your own farm shop, without any pressure!
70070000032319.name: Sugardew Island - Easter Bundle

70070000032799.description: Dive into a diverse 15-in-1 game collection packed with action, puzzles, and adventure! Battle through space in Galaxy Battle, explore dangerous lands in Shadow Quest and Dungeons and Goblins, and test your skills in challenges like Ramp Bike Racing, Parking Pro: Top-Down Challenge, and Nightshade Ninja Warrior. Relax with clever puzzles in Pool Puzzles, Pipes Master, and Word Quest, or chase high scores in fun arcade titles like Bounce Journey, Foxy's Coin Hunt, and Cloud Roll. With racing, strategy, puzzles, and arcade fun, this bundle offers something for every type of player.
70070000032799.intro: 15 games, endless fun – action, puzzles, and adventure in one ultimate bundle!
70070000032799.name: 15-in-1 Mega Bundle

70070000034696.description:
Cook tons of delicious meals from all over the world and become the best chef in the city!

Cook hundreds of tasty dishes with all the possible kitchen appliances and countless ingredients! 
Try it all: coffee makers, juice machines, pizza ovens, frying pans, fryers and ice cream machines. 

Upgrade and decorate your restaurants to attract more clients. 

Upgrade your kitchen appliances and ingredients to cook tasty dishes faster and earn more money!

This comprehensive collection includes three great cooking games: Food Truck Tycoon, Burger Chef Tycoon and Pizza Bar Tycoon!

Features:
* More than 100 dishes to serve 
* 3 unique locations
* More than 200 levels to explore
* Countless upgrades
* Unlock new items to upgrade your kitchen appliances, interiors and ingredients
* 100+ achievements to gain

This bundle includes Cooking Tycoons - 3 in 1 Bundle and Pizza Bar Tycoon Multiplayer Mode with:

- This DLC for Pizza Bar Tycoon  features an exciting local multiplayer gameplay mode, allowing players to team up and play together. It adds a new layer of excitement and replayability to the game, while providing a fun and engaging experience for players to enjoy with friends and family. 

NOTE: to play the Multiplayer Mode DLC, each player will need their own set of Joy-Con™ or an additional Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller.
70070000034696.intro: A series of great cooking games in one brand-new collection!
70070000034696.name: Cooking Tycoons - 3 in 1 Bundle Premium Edition

70070000034739.description:
Racers, beware! 

Fast-paced, polished and dynamic motorbike racing now on Nintendo Switch™!

One of a kind game entirely playable with... Toy-Con™ Motorbike!

Forget about speed limits and traffic rules 'cause on this road you're the boss!

A unique mix of endless and arcade racing game featuring countless hours of fun!

IN MOTO RUSH GT YOU WILL FIND:

• Over 100 levels to beat!
• Endless racing experience
• 12 customizable motorbikes
• Toy-Con™ Motorbike support
• Race against time, ghost opponents or try various challenges! 
• Motion Controls – play by rotating your console!
• Play with the Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller
• Support all play styles - TV Mode, Tabletop Mode, Handheld Mode, Toy-Con™ Motorbike
• Experience 4 different game modes 
• Weather and day-cycle effects: rain, night, storm! 
• Experience beautifully designed roads around the world

This bundle includes base game, Grip Collection #3 and Grip Collection #4 with:

- 8 pairs of state-of-the-art racing gloves, crafted for the ultimate grip and control.
70070000034739.intro: Ultimate motorbike racing experience for all ages!
70070000034739.name: Moto Rush GT Core Edition

70070000034748.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of bowling with Bowling Fever!

Test your skills in countless game modes, visit amazingly realistic 3D locations, play fantastic mini-games and discover dozens of new bowling balls and pins!

Need a hand? Various power-ups and boosts will help you to meet the challenges.

A bowling game has never been this exciting!

- Fantastic bowling alleys from around the world.
- Fantastic 20+ balls, pins and lanes to show off!
- Multiple mini-games to complete.
- Multiple game modes to play!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #1, expansion pack #2 and expansion pack #5 with:

-30 new bowling ball styles
70070000034748.intro: Fire up "Bowling Fever" and be carried away by the emotions!
70070000034748.name: Bowling Fever Grand Edition

70070000034754.description:
Push Beyond Limits – Rule the Race!

Get ready for the next generation of speed in Formula Racing Pro 2026! Experience the ultimate adrenaline rush as you take on faster cars, smarter rivals, and brand-new circuits inspired by the world’s most iconic tracks.

With enhanced graphics, improved physics, and dynamic weather, every lap feels more real than ever. Master your racing line, react to changing track conditions, and fight for the top spot in intense head-to-head battles.

Whether you’re a seasoned pro or just starting out, Formula Racing Pro 2026 delivers pure racing excitement — accessible, fast, and endlessly thrilling!

Tune your car, chase the podium, and prove you’re the fastest driver on the grid. The future of racing starts now!

This bundle includes base game and expansion pack #4 with:

This pack introduces three stunning new liveries for your race cars, adding style and personality to your high-speed adventures.
70070000034754.intro: Push Beyond Limits – The Future of Racing Starts Now!
70070000034754.name: Formula Racing Pro 2026 Upgrade Edition

70070000034803.description:
Football Legends 2025 brings the thrill of the world’s most popular sport to your Nintendo Switch™!

Step onto the pitch and experience pure football excitement across multiple game modes and stadiums.

Play a Quick Match for instant action — perfect for a fast-paced challenge alone or with friends in local multiplayer.

Want more control? Choose the Single Match mode to select your favorite team, stadium, weather, and time of day — and compete head-to-head with friends or AI opponents.

Take on the ultimate challenge in Tournament Mode, where 16 elite teams battle for glory. Only the best can lift the trophy!

Multiple stadiums, each offering customizable weather conditions — from sunny afternoons to rainy nights under the floodlights.

Get ready to kick off, score spectacular goals, and become a true Football Legend!

This bundle includes base game, Team Pack #1 and Team Pack #2 with:
- 6 new teams
70070000034803.intro: Play. Score. Win. Become a Football Legend!
70070000034803.name: Football Legends 2025 Gold Edition

70070000034813.description:
Love cooking games? Manage 9 distinct kitchens, craft over 500 dishes, and rise to culinary stardom across 1000+ fast-paced levels in Restaurant Tycoon: My Cooking Empire. Customize your home, unlock trophies, and bring the heat!

From street food to sushi, each kitchen will test your time-management skills as you work to satisfy impatient customers and hit your goals. But it’s not all about the kitchens—customize and upgrade your home to showcase your achievements, unlock trophies, and build a true empire!

Perfect for players of all ages, this game offers fast-paced fun that’s easy to pick up, but tough to master. Can you handle the heat and build your own cooking empire?

Key Features:

9 Unique Cuisines: Master a range of cooking styles and menus.
500+ Dishes: A global selection of recipes to perfect.
1000+ Levels: Challenge yourself with increasingly complex kitchens.
Home Customization: Upgrade your furniture and earn trophies to showcase your progress.
Fun & Fast-Paced: Simple to play, with endless hours of culinary excitement!

This bundle contains base game, DLC#2- Cozy Living and DLC#3- Creative Desk with:

- stylish sofas, chairs, and accessories that will give your living room a unique atmosphere.
- an elegant desk, a comfortable chair, and other accessories that let you create your dream office!
70070000034813.intro: Universe bursting with flavors and culinary adventures awaits!
70070000034813.name: Restaurant Tycoon: My Cooking Empire - Diamond Edition

70070000034910.description:
In S.N.I.P.E.R.: Hunter Scope you will shoot, you will fight, and you will win!

Play S.N.I.P.E.R., the latest sniping game where you aim, fight and destroy virtual enemies. Try different types of missions, inspired both by classic rail shooters and modern cover shooters. Fight your way out during day and night, destroy evil forces and unlock new weapons and power-ups.

Game includes:
15+ STAGES
30+ WEAPONS
30+ GALLERY ITEMS
60+ SPECIAL ACHIEVEMENTS 

Become a hunter, mount your scope, and fight for our freedom!

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack, Elite Arsenal and Expansion Pack #2 with:

• With the Expansion Pack you can fight and survive the zombie apocalypse in a brand new game mode!

Unlock 3 powerful weapons to use them in the DLC and base game to improve your scores.
Play new maps or revisit old ones with new weapons.
Fill your gallery and cabinet with new models and medals.

• Want some more reliable and tested guns for your collection? With this expansion, you'll get: 
-RVL-357-WES pistol: a classic revolver with a timeless design 
-BK-47-CAM rifle: a rugged and reliable rifle inspired by the old west 
-SN-1100-TRI sniper rifle: a modern-day cowboy sniper rifle 
- FMS-1-G rifle

Conquer your enemies in the wild west style!
70070000034910.name: S.N.I.P.E.R. - Hunter Scope Comprehensive Edition

70070000034921.description:
Get behind the wheel in Motorbikes Pro 2025 and experience the excitement of high-speed racing! With stunning graphics and intuitive controls, this game is perfect for racers of all ages. 

This thrilling racing game puts you right in the driver’s seat of fast-paced Motorbikes racing action. Feel the rush as you speed through corners, overtake opponents, and navigate each twist and turn of the track with precision. Accessible, fun, and incredibly addictive!

Choose your car, perfect your timing, and race your way to glory. The track is calling, and the thrill of victory is just one race away!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #2 and expansion pack #4 with:

-2 sets of premium skins for motorbikes
70070000034921.intro: Feel the Speed, Own the Track!
70070000034921.name: Motorbikes Pro 2025 Value Edition

70070000034931.description:
Pool Fever brings the classic game right to your Nintendo Switch™, perfect for beginners and pool sharks alike! 

Pool Fever offers a fun, accessible, and realistic billiards experience. With stunning 3D graphics and intuitive gameplay, you’ll feel like you’re playing in your favorite bar or pool hall. Whether you want to play in solo mode or challenge a friend in 2-player local multiplayer – either way, the table is set for hours of entertainment.

Choose from 10 different table designs, 15 unique cues, and 5 custom cue balls to create your perfect game setup. With three difficulty levels, you'll always have a challenge no matter your skill level.

So, chalk your cue, line up your shot, and sink the 8-ball - it’s game time!

Features:

10 different table designs 
15 unique cues sticks
5 custom cue balls 
3 difficulty levels
Play solo or in 2-player local multiplayer
Realistic 3D graphics

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #1 and expansion pack #3 with:

- 10 new pool table designs
70070000034931.intro: The classic pool experience, right at home!
70070000034931.name: Pool Fever Superior Edition

70070000034935.description:
Discover the perfect balance of strategy and skill in Snooker Fever.  This game brings the classic snooker experience to the Nintendo Switch™, whether you're a seasoned snooker player or just picking up a cue for the first time.

With 10 beautifully crafted tables, customizable cues, and CPU opponents that keep you on your toes, every game feels fresh. Take on the challenge solo or invite a friend for some local competition. Focus on sinking that perfect shot, while the stunning 3D visuals capture the atmosphere of a real snooker hall.

Snooker Fever has all the tools you need to master the game, enjoy some friendly competition, and just have a great time.

Key Features:

10 different tables 
15 custom cues 
3 levels of opponents
Local multiplayer 
Smooth controls and realistic 3D graphics

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack #3 and Expansion Pack #4 with:

- 10 stunning new table designs
- 5 sleek cue styles
70070000034935.intro: The classic pool experience, right at home!
70070000034935.name: Snooker Fever Discovery Edition

70070000035227.description:
Choose your favorite skin, eat, grow and stay alive. 
Compete in multiplayer mode with up to 4 players or eat it all by yourself.

Hole io: Gold Edition features:
- 8 maps with different things to swallow 
- 27 animated skins to make your black hole look cooler
- 2 multiplayer modes up to 4 players on one screen!
- endless mode where you swallow things falling from the sky
- powerups spawning during the game
- collecting themed stickers
- easy controls so anyone can play
- simple rules and lots of fun!

Grow by swallowing everything in front of you, whether it be garbage cans, fire hydrants or cars. Get large enough to consume even bigger objects or other players. Eat until nothing and no one is standing in your way!
70070000035227.intro: Show who is the biggest black hole in the entire universe!
70070000035227.name: Hole io: Gold Edition

70070000035240.description:
Discover a whole new world of combat sports games. As a newbie boxer, challenge experienced opponents and try to win and score a KO! Explore the world of boxing and make your way to the top. You can become the boxing champion, the best warrior of all time! So get ready to punch, and punch hard! Discover what you’re made of, and try to climb to the top.

This bundle includes: 
- Real Boxing 2: Remastered
- Real Boxing 2: Remastered - Landon Phil DLC
- Real Boxing 2: Remastered - Jonathan DLC
- Real Boxing 2: Remastered - Maverick DLC

Become the ultimate champion! Use jabs, hooks, uppercuts & combine them into devastating combos.

PLAY AS LEGENDARY BOXERS
Receive 3 legendary boxers with their unique equipment and a bonus of 63000 experience points right from the start!

REMASTERED VERSION
A brand new challenge awaits you as the game has been rebalanced for a fresh and fair boxing experience. With better effects and improved graphics you can feel like you're boxing for real!

CHOOSE YOUR STYLE OF BOXING
Before you KO your opponent, you need to improve your fighting skills! Adjust your boxer's stats to match your playstyle and level up quickly to unlock new abilities that will help you in fights to come! Use powerful boosts to make your dream come true. Get ready - a KO is in the air!

PLAY MINI-GAMES
Train your fighter in exciting mini games that reflect real life boxers’ training and develop your character! You need to leave a lot of sweat in your training hall to be a champion. No one said it would be an easy challenge!

CREATE YOUR DREAM BOXER
Real Boxing 2 allows you to customize your fighter! Choose your outfit, get a new tattoo and even change your haircut. Adjust all the aspects of the fighter’s body, from mass and muscle sculpture to nose shape.

DRESS TO IMPRESS
As in all fighting sports, it's best to enter the punch-out and serve a smackdown with style, so gear up - equip a pair of boots, trousers and gloves that fit your style and knock down your opponents with your looks alone.

BATTLE AGAINST UNIQUE BOSSES
Take on challenging opponents! Clown? Check. Santa? Yeah, he's there. A real stone golem? You bet. Defeat them all and claim their epic gear!

Join the club, create your boxer, and start your boxing career. Get ready to punch, and punch hard! Discover what you’re made of, and climb to the top!
70070000035240.intro: Take the fight to the next level with a remaster of award winning Real Boxing™ 2. Train hard, fight harder. Prove your worth in the career and multiplayer mode.
70070000035240.name: Real Boxing 2: Remastered - Platinum Edition

70010000120326.description:
Cozy Bay Hike is a relaxing exploration game where you wander across a charming island, uncovering every hidden location at your own pace. There are no enemies, no timers, and no pressure — just you, the breeze, and a beautifully crafted world waiting to be discovered.

Features:
> Peaceful island exploration
> Discover hidden locations
> Complete your discovery journal
> Relaxing atmosphere & soundtrack
> Simple, cozy gameplay
70010000120326.intro: Welcome to your next peaceful adventure.
70010000120326.name: Cozy Bay Hike

70010000120560.description:
Jump across unlikely platforms, balance on crazy objects, and prove that feline curiosity truly has no limits.

Collect coins along the way and unlock new cats to customize your adventure. Beware of ghosts that may attack you along the path.

The real challenge? Stay calm, calculate every jump, and prove that no obstacle is too great for a cat!
70010000120560.intro: Take control of a fearless cat on a vertical journey, always upward.
70010000120560.name: Cat-up!

70070000035209.description:
Enjoy your short life as a hot dog playing SOLO or with FRIENDS! (up to 8 players)

This edition includes:
- base game with 150 deadly levels and tasty powerups
- fresh sausage pack of 3 new skins (Beekeeper, Firefly, Toxic)

Choose your sausage and run for your life! This race is a hot dog’s dream - or nightmare - depending on how well you do.
70070000035209.intro: The most exciting sausage race in the world! Let the bodies hit the floor in a ketchup bath!
70070000035209.name: Run Sausage Run!: Poison Edition

70010000120309.description:
Travel the world in this cozy hidden-object adventure inspired by real cities like Tokyo, Paris, Rio, and Venice. 

Explore charming hand-drawn scenes, relax, decorate, and discover hidden treasures across iconic destinations.

Features

- Explore iconic cities from around the world in cozy, hand-drawn scenes
- Find hidden objects and complete relaxing missions at your own pace
- Decorate charming locations and bring each city to life
Unlock new destinations and collect unique souvenirs
- Create levels to share with the world and play levels made by other players
- Enjoy a peaceful soundtrack and soothing visuals

Slow down and enjoy the simple joy of discovery, one city at a time.

Ogre Pixel
2026
70010000120309.intro: Cozy hidden-object adventure across iconic world cities
70010000120309.name: Hidden around the World

70010000093310.description:
The classic shooter/RPG is back and better than ever! Featuring a unique mix of side-scrolling shoot-'em-up space battles and top-down planetary exploration, Sigma Star Saga DX is an explosive genre mashup that lets you take control of Allied Earth Federation pilot Ian Recker and infiltrate the alien Krill Empire as a double agent in a last-ditch effort to save mankind. 

With loyalties divided between humans and Krill, you must investigate six planets using an ever-expanding set of tools and abilities, and jump into the cockpit to engage enemy forces in intense shmup-style combat using more than 70 different Gun Data items. Gorgeous pixel-art graphics, epic boss battles, and a twist-filled story with multiple endings await. 

The new DX version adds numerous refinements over the original 2005 release, including an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, enhanced dialogue, additional save points, assorted bug fixes and quality-of-life updates, and more.

Key Features:
• The handheld classic returns after 20 years!
• Top-down RPG-style exploration mixed with action-packed space-shooter battles!
• Survive as a double agent for the humans and the Krill, and discover the secret of the six planets
• Stunning pixel-art graphics and fantastic soundtrack
• Explore using tools like the Scanner, Krill Boots, Wings, and more
• Customize your ship with more than 70 different Gun Data items yielding 15,000+ combinations
• Branching story with multiple endings
• The definitive DX version adds an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, updated script, various bug fixes, and other enhancements
70010000093310.intro: Half shoot-'em-up, half RPG! Blast through an intergalactic genre mashup!
70010000093310.name: Sigma Star Saga DX

70010000101010.description:
Eko and the Bewitched Lands: Rescue, Survive, Repeat!

Master the Elements and Defy the Dark Queen!
Princess in peril? Best friend kidnapped? It’s just another Tuesday for Eko. Dive into a charming yet ruthless world where your reflexes are your best ally. Eko and the Bewitched Lands blends fast-paced action with deep roguelike strategy, ensuring no two rescue missions are ever the same.

Adapt or Perish
Why play the same way twice? Discover a massive arsenal of weapons, mystical artifacts, and game-changing abilities. Will you become a whirlwind of steel, or a strategic mastermind using the environment to crush your foes? The choice isn’t just about style—it’s about survival.

High-Stakes Exploration
The Bewitched Lands are alive and ever-changing. Uncover ancient relics that grant god-like power... or trigger a deadly curse. Every corner hides a secret, and every secret is a gamble. Do you dare to decipher the runes?

Why you’ll love it:
- Adrenaline-Fueled Combat: Master the perfect dodge and unleash devastating elemental combos (Fire, Water, and beyond!).
- Infinite Variety: Randomly generated layouts and hundreds of upgrade combinations mean a fresh challenge every run.
- Brain & Brawn: It's not just about hitting hard; use puzzle-solving skills and the environment to outsmart the Dark Queen’s minions.
- Charming Chaos: Experience a magical, vibrant atmosphere that hides a punishing, rewarding difficulty curve.
70010000101010.intro: Help Eko rescue the Princess (and his best friend!) from the Dark Queen in this charming, fast-paced roguelike action RPG!
70010000101010.name: Eko and the Bewitched Lands

70010000119330.description:
A voice is saying your name. A WWII-era machine, long hidden in a church basement, whirs to life. Through a crackling speaker, a man asks you to find a stolen book. He only knows the title. Time is running out.

The machine, created by Bletchley Park engineers Cecil Caulderly and Beatrice Dooler, contains a vast archive of obscure books, letters, and journals fed in over the span of fifty years in an attempt to crack the code of reality. As their lives fell apart, the machine kept working.

Navigate the computer’s archive. Link its obscure texts and uncover its creators’ secrets. Communicate with the man behind the speaker to figure out your role in this mystery. Destroy the book at the core of the machine — before it’s too late.

NARRATIVE DEDUCTION

• Deduce links through the archive to locate hidden sources.

• Unravel the stories and unearth the secrets of the books’ authors and the machine's creators.

• Map the archive and find the book that will rewrite the world.

INTERACTIVE AUDIO DRAMA

• Talk with your handler at any time, creating a dynamic audio drama that responds as you explore.

• Featuring the voices of Rebekah McLoughlin, Paul Warren and Phillipe Bosher.

• Original soundtrack by Laurence Chapman.

Written and created by the award-winning team behind Heaven's Vault, Overboard!, and A Highland Song.
70010000119330.intro: A World War II computer. An archive of lost books. A world-changing secret. Narrative deduction meets audio drama, from the creators Heaven's Vault.
70010000119330.name: TR-49

70010000105657.description:
Our planet is under attack from the Star Spores, and they've warped life on Earth into ferocious uber-bugs.

Even worse, a nasty alien has made its new home directly attached to your head.

But it's not all bad news - your new best friend has provided both the strength to fight back against the mutated horde, and control over a weapon that can tip the balance of the battle in humanity's favor: the ChainStaff.

As you traverse the surreal landscape, you'll encounter your fellow soldiers, stranded in harsh environments. Do you rescue your comrades or listen to the alien voice in your head and harvest them for upgrades?

If you can persevere and defeat the Star Spores, perhaps you can save everyone…including yourself."
GAME FEATURES
MASTER THE CHAINSTAFF
Hurl it as a spear and slice aliens in half. Throw it to the ground as a shield to stop incoming attacks. Grapple and swing on just about anything. The transforming ChainStaff does all this and more, and all with one button, it’s all up to you.
YOU DIED
Pounded to mush, stabbed through the heart, sheared in two. Prepare to meet your doom in a myriad of disgusting ways. All deaths are avoidable, but some dangers may require special strategies.
FEROCIOUS FOES
The creatures of Earth have been mutated by aliens: you’ll come across dozens of unusual creatures, and once you get past those, you’ll have to fight against screen-filling monstrosities.
GROTESQUE UPGRADES
Stranded soldiers dot the landscape of ChainStaff. You must choose whether to rescue them or devour their organs; each option has unique benefits and will lead to different endings.
10 WILD LEVELS
"Mist trails through rocky crags.
Wind blows over icy, moon-lit hills.
Water streams down mossy cliffs.
Fully hand-drawn art immerses you in a living world inspired by album covers of the 70s and 80s."
KILLER SOUNDTRACK
"Scorching riffs and peals of thunder. Pumping beats drive you ever forward.
Rock out to the classic metal soundtrack by the award-winning composer Deon van Heerden of Broforce and Warhammer 40k: Shootas Blood & Teef soundtrack fame. There’s some lighter interludes with 70s synth, catchy melodies, and even some cowbell. Now it’s back to the heavy tracks, where it’s time to bang your head while smashing skulls.

All depictions of violence are 2 dimensional and heavily stylized. As part of your quest to cleanse Earth of the Star Spore menace, you'll use all the weapons at your disposal to defeat your foes, many of whom will die bloody deaths. Additionally, you may harvest resources from your fellow soldiers in order to increase the power of the alien keeping you alive, and this process is messy.
70010000105657.intro: ChainStaff is a brutal action-platformer with a transforming spear and grappling hook, blazing weapon upgrades, and a rocking soundtrack.
70010000105657.name: ChainStaff

70010000110454.description:
Immerse yourself in the chilling tale of the Chen Family Village, where a mother searching for her missing daughter accidentally stumbles into a haunted place filled with mysterious cults. Guide Jia Jun Lee as she searches a village and pieces together fragile clues to her loved one’s whereabouts, carefully hiding her movements as supernatural threats close in from all sides.

Incantation is a first-person horror-themed adventure game adapted from the live action film of the same name. Beyond the palpable madness and fear in the village, there's a sinister force that drives one to despair. What happens when one crosses the forbidden line of this evil deity?

Perform rituals, solve puzzles, collect documents and hunt for key items to access new areas of the village, all in hopes of finding your missing daughter and escaping alive!

• Explore a remote village that harbors evil secrets and worships malicious spirits!
• Search for clues to your missing daughter’s whereabouts while evading your pursuers.
• Unravel an eerie ritual and discover its deep secrets!
• Solve environmental puzzles and collect key items to gain access to new areas.
• Enjoy an immersive cinematic experience inspired by Taiwanese culture and traditions!
70010000110454.intro: Brave the darkness of a haunted village in hopes of finding a lost loved one!
70010000110454.name: Incantation

70010000079797.description:
“SHIKA-Q” is an ultra-fast competitive puzzle game where players connect “Links” on a 10×10 board, and victory or defeat is decided in an instant.

The board evolves in real time as attacks, interference, recovery, and special moves unfold simultaneously. With barely a moment to think, players must constantly decide their next move, creating intense tension and speed.

Unlike traditional falling-block puzzle games, blocks do not drop from above. The board begins reacting the moment you place a piece. Because it is a real-time competitive system, players must not only connect Links but also read their opponent’s intentions—creating mind games similar to those found in fighting games.

Every decision directly impacts the outcome. Both strategic thinking and reflexes are essential. Momentum shifts rapidly, and the game state is visually clear, making it exciting not only to play but also to watch—an ideal fit for esports.

The game’s defining feature is its Music.

Vocal tracks and high-energy songs amplify the intensity of battle. Rather than serving as simple background music, the vocal tracks integrate with gameplay flow, directly enhancing tension and momentum. Music, play, and emotion synchronize to create an unprecedented level of immersion.

Game Features
■ Strategy ×Super Speed × Competitive Play (1–2 Players)

Connect Links on a 10×10 board as offense and defense unfold in real time. Instant decisions determine victory.

Custom settings allow players to adjust the balance between speed and strategy—from slower, thought-focused matches to ultra-high-speed battles.

In addition to Offline Versus, the game also supports Online Battles and Ranked Matches, where split-second judgment determines the winner against players worldwide.

■ Challenge Mode (Single-Player)

A world-ranking-supported solo mode fully synchronized with music.

As stages progress, both the music and gameplay evolve. Manage your health, balance offense and defense, clear all 99 stages, and aim for a high score.

Unlike Versus Mode, this mode emphasizes discovering the optimal solution for each situation.

■ Characters, Worldbuilding & Customization

A diverse cast of characters enhances the competitive experience through unique themes and presentation.

Customize UI design, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, icons, and more to personalize your matches.

Each theme includes dedicated character songs, deepening both musical and narrative immersion.

Tailor the atmosphere to your playstyle and express yourself through battle presentation.

■ DLC Battle Pass – Expanding the Online Experience

The DLC Battle Pass unlocks rewards progressively through mission completion.

It includes premium customization content such as UI designs, music, emotes, loading screens, wallpapers, and icons—enhancing the competitive experience.

The more you play, the more your presentation evolves. Your progress remains visible, supporting a long-term online experience built on growth and achievement.
70010000079797.name: SHIKA-Q

70010000081474.description:
FROGGONIT is a cute adventure-exploration game set on an island full of friendly animals.

The problem is (there’s always something, isn’t there?) that you accidentally summoned a villain who covered the entire island in darkness!

The good thing is that you are a frog obsessed with secrets and discoveries, so this is your chance to be a hero and save everyone!

(You don’t really have a choice).

GAMEPLAY:
EXPLORE - Every single room is filled with secrets and ready to be rediscovered.
DANCE - Out of context!
HOP - Reach awkward places! (But please don't break the game)
RIBBIT - Use it to startle your friends! (It also works as a hint system)
PLAY MINI GAMES - I got a bit carried away and made over 40!

FEATURES:
Pixelated 2D sprites in 3D environments
Explore an island full of hidden secrets
Help your animal friends!
Solve puzzles to unlock new areas
Play over 40 mini-games! 
Dance with everyone!
Dedicated RIBBIT button!
Hop everywhere!
Take selfies!
Original soundtrack
4th-wall breaking
Lots of humor!
70010000081474.intro: FROGGONIT was trying to be the best explorer but accidentally covered the island with darkness! Hop into this comedy adventure game full of secrets and restore the light!
70010000081474.name: FROGGONIT

70010000103011.description:
Seven years after the dramatic events in Anemone Valley, the political situation surrounding magic has reached boiling point within the Empire. At the Seven Winds Academy, however, life goes on undisturbed by outside influences. Here, the students’ biggest worries are exams, job prospects, and who might be taking whom to the New Year’s Gala, but when a curious group of seniors stumble upon a secret hidden within the castle, their priorities for the year change in an instant…

Explore a brand new adventure as a mage student of the Seven Winds Academy and experience a story that can be enjoyed by new and returning players of the series. Choose from three different magical disciplines, and let your choices shape the personality of your character as you navigate school life during a time of great change.

As you uncover the story of Arcadia Fallen II, you will decide how you respond to the people around you and the events that unfold. Tone labels help you avoid unexpected consequences, and choices with significant impact on the story are highlighted. But no matter what you decide to do, there are no “wrong” choices and no dead ends. Only you can find the path that is right for you.

Your chosen magical discipline will affect your character's upbringing, what locations they are familiar with, and what skills they bring to the team. This and more will influence puzzles throughout the game and challenge you in different ways depending on the choices you make in each playthrough.

No true boarding school experience is complete without a bit of rule-breaking! Sneak out at night with your friends and discover the secrets the old castle holds. If you’re daring, you might pick up some juicy gossip as well.
70010000103011.intro: Choose from three different magical disciplines, and let your choices shape the personality of your character as you navigate school life during a time of great change
70010000103011.name: Arcadia Fallen II

70010000103227.description:
A century after the legendary artist Orwiel vanished, Sion and Michelle begin a journey to uncover his final works. Along the way, they encounter Liara, a mysterious girl who has lost her memories. What she carries holds the power to alter their path and entwine their fates, drawing the party into a story of art, destiny, and hidden truths in a classic fantasy world.

This classic command-based JRPG features a 3D isometric map interface and smooth, dynamic battle animations. Explore dungeons and engage in easy-to-learn turn-based combat inspired by old-school RPGs. Enhance weapons at the blacksmith, learn up to five skills per character, and strengthen those skills through repeated use as their power and effects evolve. Build the SP gauge during battle to unleash powerful special abilities, and expend it all at once to trigger devastating combo attacks with your allies.
70010000103227.intro: Explore isometric dungeons and master evolving skills in a classic JRPG
70010000103227.name: Tears Revolude

70010000104936.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Hujeong Auditorium , Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 2 flight courses in 1 areas.
 high-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery.
70010000104936.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Hujeong Auditorium

70010000106829.description:
This game requires a good level of understanding of the English language in order to play.
 
Beyond Words
The genre-defining fusion of roguelike strategy and word-crafting. Build powerful combos, unlock upgrades, and master a challenge where victory is spelled one letter at a time.
 
 Build powerful word combos, unlock game-changing upgrades and journey through a living puzzle shaped by your decisions. Every choice, every letter, every placement matters.
 
It's Time To Spell!
Play your own way by switching up letter scores, duplicating the ones you love and destroying the ones you don’t. Bend the rules past breaking point with modifiers, stickers, and enhancements where every choice shapes your journey. Think your way through seemingly impossible situations or pick up the pace and go fast and frantic with optional time-attack boards. 
 
Evolve and Adapt 
Over 300 unique modifiers and abilities — supercharged tile types, booster cards, power cards, pickups & perks.
 
Endless combinations bring surprise and opportunity for your creative strategies. It’s all about synergies, combos, and clever play — where every decision can dramatically alter the course of a run. As you progress, your expanding toolbox rewards you with new possibilities every time you play.
 
Master Challenges
Each board is a unique puzzle where your words matter. Shifting rules, layouts and objectives keep you adapting in an evolving tactical space. Be a friend to your future self - plan ahead, create routes to powerful pickups and think like a strategist setting up devastating power-scoring combos for that perfect chef’s-kiss word play.
 
Bosses with Bite
Overcome 30+ unique Boss challenges that twist the rules in devious ways. When you’re ready to push further, take on time attacks, seeded runs or the brain-melting flipside of negative scoring. Escalating targets and endless play mean there’s always an opportunity to flex your skills in gratifying challenges which demonstrate your level of mastery.
 
Instantly Playable, Infinitely Replayable
Easy to pick up thanks to familiar word-tile mechanics while incredibly rewarding to master, welcoming both casual players and hardcore strategists. Whether you’re chasing the highest scores, experimenting with outrageous synergies or simply relaxing into the rhythm of letters and logic - Beyond Words is a playground for endless discovery where every word counts.
70010000106829.intro: Beyond Words is a genre-defining fusion of roguelike strategy and word-crafting.
70010000106829.name: Beyond Words

70010000110929.description:
The Confinement is an FP4 (First Person Paced Precision Platformer) that combines speed, precision, and reflexes in an extremely challenging parkour experience. You are trapped in a simulation created by the artificial intelligence AmokAI, where every move could be your last.

Run, dodge, jump, and dash as you navigate narrow corridors, suspended platforms, and deadly traps in a hostile, technological environment. Each level is designed to test your skill, your quick reading of the scenario, and your ability to improvise under pressure.

With around 30 to 40 short and intense stages, each stage encourages constant improvement, challenging you to beat your own times and compete with other players. The combination of fluid movement, intense challenges, and striking surroundings makes The Confinement an ideal experience for those seeking fast action, extreme precision, and high replay value.
70010000110929.intro: The Confinement is a game that puts your skills to the test. Master precise movements, strategic dashes, and challenging courses.
70010000110929.name: The Confinement

70010000111322.description:
Brave Rounds is a fast-paced, close range-heavy vertical scrolling shoot 'em up with the beauty and ruthless precision of 00s arcade classics. Shoot them up by yourself or co-op together with a friend!

Master the art of getting closer and beat the heck out of them!

Play as one of three playable characters accompanied with their Options. Shoot the wide shot, focus shot, deploy the bombs, or unleash their special!

You don't have to fight alone; get a friend and play together in Two Player where they control the Options directly! Or control both characters at once with just one controller with Dual Control!

Brave Rounds tells a touching story of inter-generational relationships and the lengths people take to accomplish their goals. Set in the occult and sci-fi-laden modern era of 20XX, Brave Rounds explores the worth in fighting for what you believe in.

Features:
- Arcade Mode, the game's main mode of high-intensity five stages action. Fight the mid-bosses, bosses, and watch out for the dynamic difficulty: Rank! Are you worthy enough to face the True Last Boss...?
- Stage Practice, for your practicing convenience. Whenever you get stuck at Arcade Mode, visit the Stage Practice.
- Story Mode, telling a different story from Arcade Mode, is where you tackle 41 bite-sized stages. Complete the challenges, get the stars, upgrade your strength. Explore the world of Brave Rounds and the motivations behind the characters in lively and animated Visual Novel-style cutscenes!
- Score Attack. Get the high score in the Score Attack-exclusive stage within the 3 minutes time limit! Dare to put the gas on the pedal and raise the rank to its limit?
- Inspired by 00s video games and animes, Brave Rounds features smooth, hi-res hand-drawn art and animations. Colorful and expressive! Watching their movements is key to success.
- Enjoy the soundtrack of various genres by Dicky Teja Pratama, Jasson Prestiliano and Scowsh!
- Screen scaling options including TATE / Vertical mode, rebindable conrols, and replays!
70010000111322.intro: Shoot, punch and get closer through bullets and enemies in this close range-heavy arcade bullet hell shoot 'em up!
70010000111322.name: Brave Rounds

70010000111765.description:
